zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Covert VI於1472年出生在英國素可時，他的父親Thomas Covert23歲，母親Elizabeth Sidney20歲。他於1490年與Elizabeth Fagger在英國結婚。他去世於1547年6月7日在英國素可斯勞加姆享年75歲，埋葬在英國素可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Covert VI于1472年出生在英国素可时，他的父亲Thomas Covert23岁，母亲Elizabeth Sidney20岁。他于1490年与Elizabeth Fagger在英国结婚。他去世于1547年6月7日在英国素可斯勞加姆享年75岁，埋葬在英国素可。

nameMeanings.name: Covert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Surrey, of Norman origin): habitational name from the Norman hamlet of Couvert in Calvados or from some other locality similarly named from Old French (le) covert ‘the secret corner, refuge, or thicket’. Sussex surname forms with the definite article and no preposition are not nicknames from Old French covert ‘secret(ive)’, as has been suggested, but are either references to ‘Le Covert’ as the place of origin or represent the common Norman practice of substituting le for de in surnames. This surname is now extinct in Britain.
Americanized form of an unidentified Dutch or German name, perhaps   Kofoed   or German   Gobert  .

variants.name: Coovert
meanings: Americanized form of French Couvert or its Dutch form Coevert, see Covert .

variants.name: Kofoed
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Anders, Nanna.
Danish: from ko ‘cow’ + fod ‘foot’, hence a nickname for someone with a club foot or other deformity of the foot. Compare Kofford .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Covert VI was born in 1472, in Sussex, England, his father, Thomas Covert, was 23 and his mother, Elizabeth Sidney, was 20. He married Elizabeth Fagger in 1490, in England. He died on 7 June 1547, in Slaugham, Sussex, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Sussex, England.

fr.Abergavenny, Sir Fynwy, Wales: Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Covert VI est né en 1472, à Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Covert, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sidney, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Fagger en 1490, à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 7 juin 1547, à Slaugham, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Sussex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Covert VI 1472 in Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Covert 23 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Sidney 20. Er hat 1490 in England Elizabeth Fagger geheiratet. Er starb am 7. Juni 1547 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Slaugham, Sussex, England und wurde in Sussex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Covert VI è nato il nel 1472 nel Sussex, England, il suo padre, Thomas Covert, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Sidney, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Fagger nel 1490, nel England. Morì il 7 giugno 1547, nel Slaugham, Sussex, England, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Sussex, England.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Covert VI(이)가 1472년 영국 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Covert(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Sidney(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1490년 영국에서 Elizabeth Fagger(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1547년 6월 7일 영국 수세스 슬로그함에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Covert VI nasceu em 1472, em Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Covert, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Sidney, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Fagger em 1490, em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 7 de junho de 1547, em Slaugham, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Covert VI родился в 1472 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Covert было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sidney, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Fagger в 1490 г. в местности Англия. Он умер 7 июня 1547 г. в местности слоам, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности суссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Covert VI nació en 1472, en Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Covert, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Sidney, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Fagger en 1490, en Inglaterra. Murió el 7 de junio de 1547, en Slaugham, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Sussex, Inglaterra.
